name: MackilyConvo
condition: ((unit.position[0] == 38 and unit.position[1] == 34) or (unit.position[0] == 39 and unit.position[1] == 35) or (unit.position[0] == 57 and unit.position[1] == 34) or (unit.position[0] == 56 and unit.position[1] == 35)) and game.level_vars['HeirheinSeized'] == True and unit.team == 'player' and game.level_vars['MackilyConvo'] == False
commands: Sigh... Who in their right mind would want to be sent to this blasted outlook?{w}{br}To think that even at a time like this, I, the pride of the Agustrian ballisticians, am... Hm? Somebody there?{w}
